title: Israeli Airstrike Kills Five Family Members in Southern Lebanon Jebchit
summary: Israeli forces launched airstrike on Jebchit town in southern Lebanon. Attack killed five from same family during night raid. Incident violates recent truce amid escalating tensions.
contents:
## Israeli Airstrike Kills Five Family Members in Southern Lebanon Jebchit

### Overview
Israeli forces launched airstrike on Jebchit town in southern Lebanon. Attack killed five from same family during night raid. Incident violates recent truce amid escalating tensions.

### Event Details
Israeli forces conducted airstrike on Jebchit town in southern Lebanon, killing five members of the same family during night raid, Lebanon's National News Agency reports. Rescue teams struggled to reach site after strike trapped Lebanese journalists Zeinab Faraj and Amal Khalil for over hour. Lebanese President Joseph Aoun condemned similar Israeli strike on Majdal Zoun that killed five, including three civil defence personnel responding to prior attack. Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz signals plans to target Iran's leadership, awaits US approval to strike family of late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, including son Mojtaba. Air defence systems activated in Tehran parts as Iranian media reports intercepts of hostile targets. US intercepted sanctioned vessel carrying Iranian oil. Israeli attacks killed three in southern Lebanon despite 10-day truce with Hezbollah. Strikes pummeled towns like Beit Yahoun, Jmaijmeh, Hanin, destroying houses. Civil Defense teams resumed searches in Jouaiyya at dawn after airstrike. Drones circled over Tyre early Thursday. Additional strike in Tyre killed six more. Warplanes launched assaults across Nabatieh district, wounding 13 in Jebchit, contributing to 11 deaths and 30 injuries Tuesday. Lebanon toll rises with ongoing violations. Israel continues wave of attacks, escalating regional conflict involving Iran proxies.[1][8]

### Source Context
@MiddleEastEye (Middle East Eye) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on middle east iran israel syria yemen attack airstrike sanctions investigation.
